mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE verify_status = #{verifyStatus} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE is_vip = #{isVip} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY content_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM user_profile_extension WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY followers_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
